rationales.hook_strength: 'Fuller lips, no filler' is specific, contrarian and concrete — strong pattern interrupt, though the sub headline slightly over-explains the payoff.
rationales.clarity: Every slide is one tight idea with a clear mechanism — nothing vague, nothing doubled up.
rationales.audience_fit: Dehydration, sleep, nutrition — all daily-habit levers a busy 25-year-old can actually pull, though lip aesthetics skew slightly more female in this demo.
rationales.novelty: Nose-breathing and micronutrient flags are fresh angles; the hydration/SPF beats are familiar but the lip-specific framing sharpens them enough.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged ('can flag'), voice is plain and direct, CTA ties naturally to Vibe's water/food/sleep tracking pillars with no cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential — the 'no filler' hook plus actionable slide-by-slide habits make this easy to screenshot and revisit, which drives saves over shares.
